meta.intent: Create a readable pressure choice where the urgent lower route must be advanced without ignoring dock stabilization.
meta.expectedPath: Advance the lower route, use one clean dock-stabilizing triple when the rack gets hot, extract the endangered puppy, then pivot to the upper puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player either protects dock too much and loses water tempo, or rushes route residue into overflow before the first rescue.
meta.whatItProves: Dock discipline can serve water rescue order instead of replacing it as the level's main question.
meta.notes: Role: pressure_choice. Crates and ice are route/dock timing support; vine remains disabled and no new mechanics are introduced.
